title: MMO Realms Cobblemon
body:
MMO Realms is a feature-rich modpack built around Cobblemon, bringing the world of Pokémon into Minecraft with deep multiplayer mechanics and an immersive MMO experience. Capture, train, and battle Pokémon in a seamless open-world adventure with accurate battle mechanics powered by the Pokémon Showdown engine.

Designed for the MMO Realms server, this modpack enhances Cobblemon with optimized performance, quality-of-life improvements, and engaging multiplayer features. Explore vast biomes, discover ancient Pokémon ruins, trade with other trainers, and build your ultimate Pokémon team.

📌 Key Features:
✔️ Full integration of the Cobblemon mod
✔️ Capture, train, and battle Pokémon in a persistent multiplayer world
✔️ Open-world exploration with custom structures and biomes
✔️ Trading, battling, and cooperative gameplay with friends
✔️ Optimized for performance and server stability

Whether you're a casual Pokémon fan or a dedicated trainer, MMO Realms delivers an exciting and immersive Cobblemon MMO experience.

Credits: A huge thank you to the Cobblemon Team for making this possible!
